visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man in a dark suit and tie, wearing glasses. He has a serious expression and appears to be speaking. The background is a dark, solid blue, and the lighting is dramatic, highlighting the right side of his face while the left is cast in shadow. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a stylized white font. The audio features a tense and quiet exchange between two men in what sounds like a still, enclosed space. The first man speaks in a low, serious, and cautionary tone, delivering his lines with a deliberate pace. He says, "先，千万别乱说话" (First, don't talk nonsense). The camera cuts to a close-up of a second man. He has a goatee and is looking slightly upward. He brings a cigarette to his lips and takes a drag, exhaling a plume of smoke that momentarily obscures his face. The lighting is similarly dramatic, with a cool, blueish tint.
